title: creating signature: Card error
body:
I am trying to sign the images using skopeo. Getting below error,


skopeo copy docker://image docker:image --dest-creds name:**** --src-creds name:**** --sign-by ***

```
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:340af9ec366942d636c500acd18b3483079a7455d91ca774fb7a3ddc1ecfe59c
Copying blob sha256:d4967830a36987d4dc567667cf33dfddbfe8b5d67bac3c7101befc98e8b06650
Copying blob sha256:2dcece8b0a30353cc4815f059d900ad49946e0ad73be60a66513775da7a0b32f
Copying blob sha256:3a6618547550b22c1b053e55f112022be34555ca5f78b2bd71e1e2fb32220e27
Copying blob sha256:91228ad86b065ce21adaf0bf4d17bf2211e3442c24000e51749925676b73e89c
Copying blob sha256:305b871a1b3fa5045a1277c3fc5914e56ffb6798c04e670ce9ba4f10eb73e950
Copying blob sha256:4f75d8228d00f51e5d5028fff9a88978b8911459f9b8fbd83d59d401e09c1055
Copying blob sha256:70995dd6ba860b81e44d0817d9c1eda567d01a424887472fa40b7690f35a93bb
Copying blob sha256:44ae9289a519f3cc1e4be587bc38f8abfe16696352011f71159cb56411897f2d
Copying blob sha256:b39491bb31a2d09453b7590e5401c16c25f78a557948c9c7712e220b83edcc16
Copying config sha256:9870bfee80dd869f19a69da975d212623a7028438c33d97fc77ccb1a53414e5d
Writing manifest to image destination
Signing manifest
time="2023-01-30T10:19:08Z" level=fatal msg="creating signature: Card error"
```

please guide ?

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

This is an error by the underlying GPG process, and needs to be debugged at that level. See if manually signing using the GPG command line works, or in the worst case see https://www.gnupg.org/documentation/manuals/gpgme/Debugging.html .
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Since we have never heard any feedback, and this is not a skopeo issue, closing.
